description_long: This house is a modern, single-story residential building with a flat roof and a sprawling, L-shaped layout. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. A long, wide driveway leads up to the main entrance, flanked by clusters of mature trees that create a sense of privacy and greenery. The property includes a detached garage or auxiliary structure on one side, and the landscaping is minimalistic, emphasizing open space and clean lines. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some sections featuring floor-to-ceiling glass panels. The overall design is contemporary, with a focus on simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large asymmetrical windows, and a long driveway surrounded by trees. The layout is L-shaped with a detached garage and minimalistic landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the long driveway, main entrance, clusters of trees, and the L-shaped layout with the detached garage visible on the left.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the rear and side of the house, with more trees and the open backyard area visible.
description_view_2: View from the opposite side, emphasizing the driveway, the main building's length, and the alignment of trees along the property.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back entrance, additional trees, and the overall spread of the house and garage structures.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide door, minimal steps, and no porch, framed by a clean overhang and surrounded by landscaping.
